title: Sign in as a coach
description: A coach can sign in with valid credentials and arrive on the coach dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the coach dashboard is displayed

title: Create a coach account
description: A coach can complete registration with valid details and reach the authenticated coach area afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the required account details with valid values
Verify the coach dashboard is displayed
Verify a successful account creation state is visible

title: Review coach dashboard overview
description: A signed-in coach can review dashboard summary data, student status, and recent activity from the main dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the student status list and recent activity feed are visible

title: Student can update weekly task completion
description: This verifies that a student can mark a weekly task as complete and see their completion progress change.

steps.description: Fill in the student username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the student password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the task completion state is updated
Verify the weekly completion progress changes

title: Student can add a new exam result and see progress update
description: This verifies that a student can enter a new exam result and immediately see the chart and metrics reflect the added result.

steps.description: Fill in the student username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the student password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new exam result is displayed

title: Reject invalid coach sign-in
description: A coach entering invalid credentials sees sign-in feedback and does not reach the coach dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify sign-in validation or access rejection feedback is visible
Verify the coach dashboard is not displayed

title: Student can review personal exam progress
description: This verifies that a student can open their exams page and see their own results and progress over time.

steps.description: Fill in the student username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the student password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify personal exam results are displayed

title: Coach can create a new student account
description: This verifies that a coach can create a student account from the student management page and receive the temporary password needed to hand off access.

steps.description: Fill in the coach username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the coach password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a temporary password is displayed
Verify the new student appears in the list

title: Coach can update a student's weekly plan
description: This verifies that a coach can edit an assignment in a student's weekly plan and save the updated schedule.

steps.description: Fill in the coach username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the coach password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a student from the list
Verify the updated plan is displayed
Verify the change is reflected in the weekly grid

title: Send a message from coach chat
description: This test verifies that a coach can send a chat message to a student and see it appear in the conversation thread.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the message appears in the chat thread

title: Send a message from student chat
description: This test verifies that a student can send a chat message to the coach and see it appear in the conversation thread.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the message appears in the chat thread

title: View the student dashboard overview
description: This test verifies that a signed-in student can open the dashboard and see their personal overview content, motivation, and weekly progress indicators.

steps.description: Fill in the student email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to the student dashboard
Verify a personal overview is displayed
Verify motivation and weekly progress indicators are displayed

title: Coach can view exam trends for a student
description: This verifies that a coach can open the exams page and review exam results together with progress charts.

steps.description: Fill in the coach username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the coach password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Coach can open a student profile from the student list
description: This verifies that a coach can select an existing student from the list and reach that student's detail page.

steps.description: Fill in the coach username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the coach password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a student from the list
Verify the student detail view is displayed
Verify student profile information is visible

title: Create a coach note for a student
description: This test verifies that a coach can add a new note for a student and see it listed immediately afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the student detail page from the coach area
Add a new note with a unique title and body
Verify the new note appears in the notes list

title: Student can update multiple weekly tasks
description: This verifies that a student can mark several tasks across the weekly grid and see the summary update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the student username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the student password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify multiple task completion states are updated
Verify the weekly completion summary is updated

title: View a newly received chat message as unread items clear
description: This test verifies that a student can open a conversation, read incoming messages, and see the unread indicator clear after viewing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a conversation with unread messages
Verify the unread indicator is cleared

title: Coach can switch between student detail sections
description: This verifies that a coach can move between available sections in a student profile and see the selected section content.

steps.description: Fill in the coach username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the coach password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a student from the list
Verify the selected section content is displayed
Verify the previous section content is no longer shown

title: Edit an existing coach note
description: This test verifies that a coach can update an existing note and see the revised content saved.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing note for editing
Verify the updated note content is visible

title: Open and close the coach notification panel

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the notification panel is dismissed

title: Open and close the student notification panel
description: This test verifies that a student can open the notification panel, review recent items, and close it successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the notification panel is dismissed

title: See dashboard updates after an invitation or activity change
description: This test verifies that a student dashboard reflects new invitation or activity information after the page refreshes through realtime updates.

steps.description: Fill in the student email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to the student dashboard
Wait for the dashboard content to refresh
Verify invitation or activity updates are displayed
Verify the dashboard content is refreshed

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

description: A coach can dismiss a recommendation banner from the dashboard and it no longer appears.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: See realtime notification updates on the coach dashboard
description: This test verifies that a coach dashboard notification list updates when a new notification arrives without manual refresh.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for a new notification to arrive
Verify the notification list updates with a new item

title: Start coach registration from the landing page
description: A public visitor can move from the landing page into the coach registration flow.

steps.description: Click the link to start as a coach
Verify the coach registration page is displayed
Verify the registration form is visible

title: Review public product introduction
description: A public visitor can learn the product value proposition on the landing page and reach the sign-in entry point.

steps.description: Verify the product introduction is visible
Click the link to go to sign in
Verify the sign-in page is displayed

title: Keep the dashboard usable when no updates are available
description: This test verifies that a student can open the dashboard and still see a valid empty or default state when there are no current invitations or activity changes.

steps.description: Fill in the student email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to the student dashboard
Verify an empty or default state is displayed for invitations or activity
Verify the personal overview remains available
